title: Structures' spawn biomes fix
description: Fixes some structures' spawn biomes list
body:
This datapack fixes some structures' spawn biomes list:
| Structure        | Vanilla biomes | New biomes                                     |
|:----------------:|:--------------:|:----------------------------------------------:|
| Plains village   | Plains, Meadow | Forest, Sunflower Plains                       |
| Savanna village  | Savanna        | Savanna Plateau                                |
| Taiga village    | Taiga          | Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga |
| Pillager Outpost | Village biomes, mountain biomes | New village biomes |
